homeSections.title: Getting Started
homeSections.description: Clone, install, and run ERP or docs locally.

homeSections.title: Monorepo Map
homeSections.description: Package layers, ports, and where to edit.

homeSections.description: ERP, Docs, and Storybook — ports and boundaries.

homeSections.title: Contributing
homeSections.description: Coding session contract and drift guards.

accounting.summary: Journal and accounting surfaces when the accounting module entitlement is enabled.
accounting.whenToUse: Open **Accounting** when finance roles need journals or accounting screens in the ERP.

admin-audit.summary: System Admin area for audit — requires `system_admin.audit_read`.
admin-audit.whenToUse: Review **Audit** when investigating tenant activity or compliance exports.

admin-diagnostics.summary: System Admin area for diagnostics — requires `system_admin.audit_read`.
admin-diagnostics.whenToUse: Open **Diagnostics** when support needs runtime health signals for the tenant.

admin-memberships.summary: System Admin area for memberships — requires `system_admin.users_read`.
admin-memberships.whenToUse: Use **Memberships** when assigning roles or reviewing who belongs to the tenant.

admin-permissions.summary: System Admin area for permissions — requires `system_admin.permissions_read`.
admin-permissions.whenToUse: Review **Permissions** when auditing which keys a role or user effectively holds.

admin-roles.summary: System Admin area for roles — requires `system_admin.roles_read`.
admin-roles.whenToUse: Configure **Roles** when defining RBAC bundles for tenant administrators.

admin-settings.summary: System Admin area for settings — requires `system_admin.settings_read`.
admin-settings.whenToUse: Open **Settings** when adjusting tenant-level admin preferences.

admin-users.summary: System Admin area for users — requires `system_admin.users_read`.
admin-users.whenToUse: Manage **Users** when inviting colleagues or reviewing tenant membership.

ai_copilot.summary: Governed AI Copilot module when the tenant enables copilot entitlements.
ai_copilot.whenToUse: Open **AI Copilot** when your role allows governed assistant features inside the ERP.

auth-lane-access.summary: Sign-in, sign-up, and one-time password entry.
auth-lane-access.whenToUse: Use the **Access** lane when locating sign-in or registration URLs.

auth-lane-invite.whenToUse: Use the **Invite** lane when accepting a tenant invitation link.

auth-lane-recover.whenToUse: Use the **Recover** lane when resetting a forgotten password.

auth-lane-security.summary: Multi-factor authentication, session expiry, and access-denied handling.
auth-lane-security.whenToUse: Use the **Security** lane when troubleshooting MFA, session expiry, or access-denied screens.

auth-lane-verify.summary: Email verification before the workspace opens.
auth-lane-verify.whenToUse: Use the **Verify** lane when completing email verification after sign-up.

auth-lane-workspace.summary: Workspace and organization selection after authentication.
auth-lane-workspace.whenToUse: Use the **Workspace** lane after sign-in when choosing which tenant context to enter.

hrm.summary: Human resources module when the tenant enables HRM entitlements.
hrm.whenToUse: Open **HRM** when HR or admin roles manage employee and organization data.

inventory.summary: Track stock levels, warehouses, and movements when your role includes inventory access.
inventory.whenToUse: Open **Inventory** when you need to review stock, warehouses, or record movements your role allows.

manufacturing.summary: Manufacturing module when the tenant enables production entitlements.
manufacturing.whenToUse: Open **Manufacturing** when shop-floor or planning roles work with production orders.

mrp.summary: Material requirements planning when the tenant enables MRP entitlements.
mrp.whenToUse: Open **MRP** when planners run or review material requirements.

sales.summary: Sales module when the tenant enables commercial entitlements.
sales.whenToUse: Open **Sales** when sales roles manage orders and customer-facing records.

workspace.summary: Your home dashboard and workspace layout after you select a tenant context.
workspace.whenToUse: Open **Workspace** after sign-in when you need your dashboard or layout preferences.
